style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration of old stone fortress walls standing against a fast-rising sea, water already lapping over the lower ramparts while defenders hold the line above. A sense of strong defenses meeting a tide that keeps climbing. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text.
